chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1481 of 2019 (Munwar Alam Khan Vs. Federation of Pakistan & others) Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 14-02-2023. Petitioner Munwar Alam Khan present in person. Mr. Karim Bux Janwari, Assistant Attorney General, Pakistan. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The petitioner by way of instant petition has sought for directions against the respondents to secured and provide him CCTV footage and recording with regard to the incident, which taken place on 21-09-2019 within the premises of National Accountability Court, Sukkur. As per report furnished by learned Judge, Accountability Court, Sukkur, no CCTV footage or recording is available, copy whereof could be provided to the petitioner. When confronted with such report, the petitioner was not able to controvert it. Consequently the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Nasim /PA
